notes: Synthetic JD with niche martech / analytics skills that are NOT in our HARD_SKILL_KEYWORDS taxonomy. Tests the under-extraction problem: the parser will likely catch only 'SQL' and miss the 13 marketing-tech tools (Mixpanel, Snowplow, Segment CDP, etc.). 'niche_skills_known_to_miss' is a separate list documenting the known gap, scored separately so we measure HOW MUCH the parser misses on long-tail vocabulary.
